name: Gormiti Legends
overview: The island of Gorm has always been a paradise surrounded by the sea where the four tribes of earth, forest, ocean and fire have lived together for a long time in perfect harmony thanks to the connection of their elements. A distant day, this balance was broken by the fire tribe who attacked the others breaking the peace!

trailers.title: Giochi Preziosi | GORMITI LEGENDS | La serie | Trailer
